title: Write ferrum_extlib_json.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_json: JSON RFC 8259 DOM and streaming. Not in Ferrum stdlib (data.cbor exists but not JSON). Design extlib module: DOM parse/serialize, streaming SAX-style parser, typed struct derive (serde-style), integer as i64 not f64, UTF-8 validation on parse, configurable security limits (depth, string size, doc size), JSONTestSuite compliance, integration with dynamic value type.
